mapper.select: SELECT * FROM TBL_BOARD WHERE TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY CDATETIME DESC, BOARDNO DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_BOARD VALUES(null, 'user01', #{title}, #{contents},0 , #{kind}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_BOARD SET CNT = CNT + 1 WHERE BOARDNO = #{boardNo}
